body: Following up on our earlier exchange about [Beacon VC](beacon-vc) and the pipeline you mentioned — I wanted to flag that [Solis Energy](s-001) is still operating under its original CEO, Marcus Adeyemi, so any intro you were planning to route through the founding team should still land cleanly. I've been tracking their Series A prep fairly closely given how well they fit our climate infrastructure thesis at [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital), and the leadership stability has been one of the more reassuring signals. That said, I know things can shift quickly at that stage, so worth confirming directly before you make the connection. Let me know if you want to coordinate on timing — happy to loop in together if it makes the ask feel warmer on both sides.
